text: Today we are ranking Kale as a vegetable, per 100g, so you can see where it really lands.
fat is 0.9g. this is a real omega 3 flex.
carbs is 8.8g. fibre is seriously strong.
protein is 4.3g. bioavailability is kind of absurd.
vitamin k at 570% DV, vitamin c at 80% DV stand out most.
calcium at 11% DV, potassium at 7% DV stand out most.
biggest pros: micronutrient density is ridiculous. easy to build meals around. good volume for the calories.
biggest cons: energy density is very low. usually needs pairing to make a full meal. freshness and prep can matter.
Kale is S tier. Kale lands at 59 overall.
